data.title: Cosmos' ATOM surpasses $4.40, trading at $4.47 (+3.83%) after dYdX news. Neutral momentum signals key resistance ahead.
data.description: The cryptocurrency ATOM is currently priced at $4.47, marking a 3.83% increase after the announcement of its integration into Coinbase's native platform, dYdX. Technical analysis reveals that indicators are showing a neutral momentum as the market prepares to test key resistance levels.

data.title: AVTL to build new terminal in JNPA port, India for EUR 170 million with 132k cbm LPG capacity. Expected to be operational by mid-2026.
data.description: AVTL has made a positive final investment decision to construct a greenfield terminal in the JNPA port in Mumbai, India. The terminal will have a capacity of 132k cbm for LPG, 318k cbm for liquid products, and a LPG bottling plant with a 35,000MT capacity. This marks AVTL's second terminal in the JNPA port, with operations set to begin in mid-2026. The total investment of EUR 170 million will be covered by AVTL, with Vopak contributing EUR 70 million as a 42.23% shareholder. AVTL is the largest third-party owner and operator of tank storage terminals in India, operating across six ports. Vopak, headquartered in Rotterdam, provides storage and infrastructure solutions for essential products globally, facilitating the flow of energy, chemicals, and edible oils. Vopak is listed on the Euronext Amsterdam and actively supports the energy transition by developing infrastructure solutions for sustainable fuels and feedstocks.

data.title: Bitcoin Cash price surges towards $608 resistance, trading at $574.90 (+0.70%) pre-halving event in August. Bulls are gaining momentum.
data.description: Bitcoin Cash (BCH) is currently being traded at $574.90, showing a 0.70% increase. The market is displaying strong bullish indicators as it approaches the August halving. If the key resistance level at $608 is surpassed, it may lead to further advancement in price.

data.title: TGS wins contract for streamer acquisition in East Mediterranean, starting Q3, lasting 30 days.
data.description: In Oslo, Norway on August 8, 2025, TGS, a prominent provider of energy data and intelligence, has revealed the acquisition of a streamer contract in the East Mediterranean. The acquisition is set to start in the third quarter of this year and is expected to last around 30 days.

data.title: AVAX price spikes 5.59% to $23.24 amid DeFi activity surge, countering bearish trend, creating trader uncertainty.
data.description: The cryptocurrency AVAX is currently trading at $23.24, showing a daily increase of 5.59%. This surge in value is attributed to the growing DeFi activity within the market, which has helped counterbalance previous worries about technical breakdowns. These conflicting factors are leading to a situation of uncertainty for traders.

data.title: UAB "Valstybės investicinis kapitalas" approved EUR 400,000,000 medium-term note programme renewal.
data.description: UAB “Valstybės investicinis kapitalas” (the Issuer) has announced that the Issuer’s Management Board, through Decision No. 28 dated 5 August 2025, has given the green light to the Issuer’s updated medium-term note programme (the Programme) worth EUR 400,000,000.

data.title: Polkadot rebounds 6%, trading at $3.88 after Vietnam adoption; mixed technical signals and broader volatility concerns persist.
data.description: Following Vietnam's adoption push, the price of DOT has increased by 5.99% to $3.88. However, technical indicators are displaying mixed signals, indicating uncertainty in the market. This comes as the market grapples with broader concerns related to volatility.

data.title: MATIC trading at oversold levels, RSI at 38. Major exchanges gearing up for POL token swap on August 26, 2025.
data.description: The cryptocurrency MATIC is currently experiencing oversold conditions, as indicated by its Relative Strength Index (RSI) at 38. Meanwhile, leading exchanges are gearing up for the POL token swap set for August 26, 2025. This event signals a significant shift in the market dynamics, with traders closely monitoring the developments to capitalize on potential opportunities arising from this upcoming swap.

data.title: Dogecoin recovers, rises by 8.12% to $0.22 after bearish signals, facing key resistance amid mixed indicators.
data.description: The value of Dogecoin has risen to $0.22, marking a significant 8.12% increase in daily gains. This surge has brought the cryptocurrency to a key resistance level as technical indicators exhibit conflicting signals after encountering a death cross pattern last week.
